creator: avg@icyb.net.ua
text:
The correct way to do this is to create the port and submit it for inclusion to
the ports collection.
If you can't do that yourself, the you can try to find or hire someone to do it
for you.  There are mailing lists where you can communicate about that.
PR database is not the best medium for the wishlists.

-- 
Andriy Gapon
